title: werauhia cornus-cervi
intro: Werauhia cornus-cervi, also known as the deer horn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its extracts. The health benefits of Werauhia cornus-cervi include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Werauhia cornus-cervi is often prepared as a tea or infused into oil for use in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
